summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Bond Trading System V2. Successfully tested all major V2 features including Yahoo Finance integration, Telegram notifications, advanced backtesting, portfolio management, and strategy configuration. Backend APIs working correctly with 16/18 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with successful navigation between all pages and working system controls.

minor_bugs.issue: Historical market data endpoint returns empty array
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - current market data works fine, only historical data affected

minor_bugs.issue: GO-LIVE mode toggle fails when system is locked after kill switch
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - expected behavior, system needs to be unlocked first

ui_bugs.issue: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height)

integration_issues.issue: Intermittent WebSocket connection failures during page navigation
